TTRhff 30-9-1994 (igffe^T) 14. m'W.ft.-H. 848 (3T) TTRftST 7-12-1994 is. m^m.ft.R S7 (3T) TTRhar 7-2-1995 16. m^Tv-pf.^T. 633 (3T) TTT^W 13-9-199S 17. a w f t i 776 (3f) Trrdw 5-12-1995 Ogfero) 18. I f f i M . 793 (37) WOTS 13-12-1995 19. ^ . ^ . ^ . 1 2 3 (3T) Ttftm 11-3-1996 ( ^ f e ^ f ) 20. m^FT.ft.U 230 (3T) rlrftar 4-6-1996 (^jffcTO) MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th August, 1998 G.S.R. 499(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that use of the drugs specified below are likely to involve risk to human beings and that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of the said drugs in the public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 26A of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and family welfare No. G.S.R. 578 (E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely:— In the Table below to the said notification, after serial number 56 and the entry relating thereto, the following serial numbers and the entries shall be inserted, namely:— "57. Mepacrine Hydrocholride (Quinacrine and its salts) in any dosage form for use for female sterilization or contraception. 58. Fenfluramine and Dexfenfluramine." [FX-11014/2/9R-DN!/ &PFA] RENU SAHNI DHAR, Dy.
